CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON AUG-01-2024 TO ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON AUG-01-2024 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION AFTER ASBESTOS DEPARTMENTAL REASSIGNMENT FROM JUDGE SAMUEL FENG IN DEPT 503 TO JUDGE ROCHELLE EAST IN DEPT. 301. (301)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON SEP-05-2024, TO ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON NOV-7-2024, AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. KIMBERLY CHU, ESQ., AND BRYN LETSCH, ESQ. OF BRAYTON PURCELL APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA ZOOM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SOCO WEST. THE COURT STATES THAT IT NEEDS A NOTICE OF BANKRUPTCY ON FILE IN THE DOCKET TO INDICATE THAT THE MATTER IS STAYED. BRIEF DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. MS. LETSCH STATES THAT LOCAL COUNSEL DOES NOT REPRESENT DEFENDANT SOCO WEST ANY LONGER. MS LETSCH FURTHER STATES THAT SHE WILL CONTINUE EFFORTS TO REACH OUT TO OBTAIN A POINT OF CONTACT AND THAT HER EFFORTS MAY INCLUDE REACHING OUT TO THE FIRM THAT REPRESENTS SIMILARLY SITUATED INDIVIDUALS TO SEE IF THEY CAN HELP. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST, CLERK: J. ALAMEDA. NOT REPORTED. (301)
